reasoning_content:
Now I understand the task better. Let me implement the solution. I need to:

1. Update `SYsULexer.g4` to add all the necessary tokens (minus, star, div, etc.)
2. Update `main.cpp` to:
   - Add more token type mappings
   - Track file name from line markers (#)
   - Track start of line and leading space
   - Handle EOF properly

Let me start by updating the SYsULexer.g4 file to add more tokens:

task_list.title: Update SYsULexer.g4 with all required tokens
task_list.notes: Add missing tokens: minus, star, div, less, greater, lessequal, greaterequal, equalequal, exclamequal, ampersand, pipe, caret, tilde, question, colon, etc.

task_list.title: Update main.cpp token mapping
task_list.notes: Add token type mappings for new tokens

task_list.title: Implement file name tracking from #line markers
task_list.notes: Parse #line markers to extract file name and line number

task_list.title: Implement StartOfLine and LeadingSpace detection
task_list.notes: Track token position relative to newlines

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "summary": "Plan Task 1 implementation", "task_list": [{"title": "Update SYsULexer.g4 with all required tokens", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Add missing tokens: minus, star, div, less, greater, lessequal, greaterequal, equalequal, exclamequal, ampersand, pipe, caret, tilde, question, colon, etc."}, {"title": "Update main.cpp token mapping", "status": "todo", "notes": "Add token type mappings for new tokens"}, {"title": "Implement file name tracking from #line markers", "status": "todo", "notes": "Parse #line markers to extract file name and line number"}, {"title": "Implement StartOfLine and LeadingSpace detection", "status": "todo", "notes": "Track token position relative to newlines"}, {"title": "Build and test task1", "status": "todo", "notes": "Run cmake build and test"}]}
